Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 423

SPAX303 Upper Intermediate Spanish II B2.2 (3 Credits)

This upper intermediate course will allow students to be able to take part in conversations with native speakers with little or no difficulty and no grammatical errors and using acceptable pronunciation. Students achieving this level are able to handle literary texts and documents on any subject in their field of interest, and write complex texts with very few errors.

Additional Information: This course is offered as part of the Maryland-in- Barcelona study abroad program. Students must apply for this program through Education Abroad: More information at ter.ps/UMBarcelona. Education Abroad processes registrations for this course on behalf of students.
